# Billing

Manage billing, plans, and subscriptions for your account

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Billing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/index.md): Manage billing and subscriptions for your account.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/get-started/index.md): Set up billing for your Cloudflare account.
- [Create billing profile](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/get-started/create-billing-profile/index.md): Add a payment method to your Cloudflare account.
- [Update billing information](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/get-started/update-billing-info/index.md): Update payment methods, billing address, or tax IDs.

## Manage

- [Manage](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/index.md): Manage subscriptions, invoices, and usage.
- [Monitor billable usage](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/billable-usage/index.md): Track daily usage-based costs across products.
- [Budget alerts](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/budget-alerts/index.md): Get notified when spend crosses a dollar threshold.
- [Cancel Cloudflare subscriptions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/cancel-subscription/index.md): Cancel Cloudflare plans, add-ons, or subscriptions before the next billing period.
- [Change domain plan](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/change-plan/index.md): Upgrade or downgrade a domain's Cloudflare plan.
- [Invoices](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/invoices/index.md): View, download, and manage Cloudflare invoices.
- [Optimize costs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/optimize-costs/index.md): Strategies for reducing usage-based charges across Cloudflare products.
- [Pay an outstanding balance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/manage/pay-invoices-overdue-balances/index.md): Resolve unpaid invoices and overdue balances.

## Payment methods

- [Payment methods](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/payment-methods/index.md): Payment methods available for Cloudflare services.
- [Additional payment method auto-retry](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/payment-methods/additional-payment-method-auto-retry/index.md): How Cloudflare retries failed payments using additional payment methods on file.
- [Instant Bank Payments via Link](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/payment-methods/instant-bank-payments-link/index.md): Understand Instant Bank Payments via Link for Cloudflare services.
- [Stablecoin payments](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/payment-methods/stablecoin-payments/index.md): Pay for Cloudflare services with USDC stablecoin at the checkout.

## Understand

- [Understand](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/index.md): Understand how Cloudflare billing works.
- [Billing permissions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/billing-permissions/index.md): Who can view and manage billing on your Cloudflare account.
- [Billing policy](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/billing-policy/index.md): Review refund policy, payment methods, and billing terms.
- [Billing FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/faq/index.md): Answers to common billing questions.
- [How Cloudflare billing works](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/how-billing-works/index.md): Billing lifecycle, charge types, and invoice details.
- [How charges accrue](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/how-charges-accrue/index.md): How a request generates billable usage across Cloudflare products.
- [Preview services](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/preview-services/index.md): Try contracted products for 30 days before purchasing.
- [Sales tax](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/sales-tax/index.md): Understand Cloudflare sales tax by region.
- [Usage-based billing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/understand/usage-based-billing/index.md): Products that bill based on metered consumption.

## Troubleshoot

- [Troubleshoot](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/index.md): Troubleshoot common Cloudflare billing issues.
- [Billing error reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/error-reference/index.md): Common billing error messages and solutions.
- [Resolve "cannot remove payment method"](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/resolve-cannot-remove-payment-method/index.md): Fix errors when removing a payment method.
- [Resolve "you cannot modify this subscription"](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/resolve-you-cannot-modify-this-subscription/index.md): Fix errors when modifying a canceled subscription.
- [Resolve the zone cannot be upgraded error](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/resolve-zone-cannot-be-upgraded/index.md): Fix errors when upgrading a zone or subscription.
- [Resolve a payment failure](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/troubleshoot-failed-payments/index.md): Fix failed payment and declined card errors.
- [Troubleshoot invoices](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/troubleshoot/troubleshoot-invoices/index.md): Resolve common invoice discrepancies.

## Threshold billing

- [Threshold billing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/billing/threshold-billing/index.md): Understand threshold-based billing for Cloudflare services.
